selector_name: hub source rule: non-anchor and two anchor neighbors
leaf source rule: non-anchor and one anchor neighbor or connected to hub
omitted source rule: non-anchor, no anchor neighbor, not connected to hub
target node reconstruction: anchors plus hub plus leaves
carrier reconstruction: inner plus spoke plus outer rules
inner tie reconstruction: both endpoints anchors
anchor spoke reconstruction: one anchor to leaf or hub
outer return reconstruction: hub to zero-anchor leaf
